name: Wrike
description: Connect to Wrike to sync folders, tasks, users, comments, and timelogs via the Wrike REST API v4.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Wrike app (Apps & Integrations → API → Create App).

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Wrike app.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.description: OAuth redirect URI registered with your Wrike app. Defaults to your Shielva callback URL.
install_fields.help: OAuth callback URL. Leave blank to use the default.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all Wrike resources: folders, tasks, users, and comments.

apis.name: List Folders
apis.description: Return all folders accessible to the authenticated user.

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: Return tasks, optionally scoped to a folder.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Return all users (contacts) in the Wrike account.

apis.name: List Comments
apis.description: Return all comments, handling pagination via ``nextPageToken``.

apis.name: Get Task
apis.description: Return a single Wrike task by ID.
